title: oceanmanman
description: Oceanmanman is a modpack that enhances Minecraft with visual tweaks, new structures, and quality-of-life improvements. It keeps the experience vanilla-friendly, adding fun non-game-breaking changes. Inspired by NIKO YAPS' Modpack. Full credit to Mod devs
body:
# **Oceanmanman Modpack** 🌊👥  
## Under Development  
### For Aden  

**Oceanmanman** is a fun, vanilla-friendly modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience without breaking the game. Featuring improved visuals, quality-of-life tweaks, and exciting new structures, this pack keeps things fresh while staying true to the original feel of Minecraft. Whether you're exploring, building, or just adventuring, **Oceanmanman** adds just the right amount of extra fun!  

## **Features:**  
🔹 **Subtle Tweaks & Enhancements** – Enjoy improved entity animations, better UI, and smarter controls with **EMF, ESF, ETF, and BetterF3**.  
🔹 **New Structures & Exploration** – Discover expanded dungeons, revamped strongholds, and more with **Dungeons & Taverns and Stronghold Overhaul**.  
🔹 **Optimized Performance** – Run smoother than ever with **Sodium, Lithium, Indium, and ModernFix**.  
🔹 **Quality-of-Life Improvements** – Faster tree chopping, easy inventory sorting, and helpful tooltips with **FallingTree, Simple Copper Pipes, and Jade**.  
🔹 **Creative & Replay Tools** – Build efficiently and relive your best moments with **Litematica, Litematica Printer, and ReplayMod**.  
🔹 **No Roadmap, Just Fun!** – This pack is all about enhancing the game in small but meaningful ways—nothing game-breaking, just good times.  

## **Credits & Inspiration:**  
**Inspired by** [NIKO YAPS' Modpack](https://www.youtube.com/@nikoyaps)  
**Full credit** to all mod developers—none of these are mine.  

Download now and enjoy a fresh yet familiar Minecraft experience! 🌊🚀

## [**Server Modpack**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/oceanmammam)
